Appending patch output and attaching patch-setup.py.rej file. -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [root@freebsd-vm] /usr/ports/biology/py-biopython # patch < patch.txt Hmm... Looks like a unified diff to me... Hunk #1 succeeded at 6. Hunk #2 succeeded at 14. Hmm... The next patch looks like a unified diff to me... The text leading up to this was: -------------------------- |diff -urN py-biopython/distinfo py-biopython.new/distinfo |--- py-biopython/distinfo 2008-10-11 23:26:33.000000000 +0800 |+++ py-biopython.new/distinfo 2009-04-23 11:44:11.000000000 +0800 -------------------------- Patching file distinfo using Plan A... The text leading up to this was: -------------------------- |diff -urN py-biopython/files/patch-setup.py py-biopython.new/files/patch-setup.py |--- py-biopython/files/patch-setup.py 2007-05-30 14:57:20.000000000 +0800 |+++ py-biopython.new/files/patch-setup.py 1970-01-01 08:00:00.000000000 +0800 -------------------------- File to patch: No file found--skip this patch? [n] y Skipping patch... Hunk #1 ignored at 0. 1 out of 1 hunks ignored--saving rejects to patch-setup.py.rej Hmm... The next patch looks like a unified diff to me... Hunk #25 succeeded at 1192. done ________________________________ From: Mauricio Herrera Cuadra To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org Cc: Martin Wilke ; wen heping Sent: Wednesday, April 29, 2009 12:38:10 PM Subject: Re: ports/133951: [Update]biology/py-biopython:update to 1.50 Forwarding to bug-followup@ so patch is attached to the PR. ----- Forwarded Message ---- From: wen heping To: Martin Wilke Cc: mauricio@arareko.net Sent: Wednesday, April 29, 2009 10:14:16 AM Subject: Re: ports/133951: [Update]biology/py-biopython:update to 1.50 I attached the revised diff file to both of you:maintainer and miwi@. Regards, wen --0-1688065446-1241538639=:16171 Content-Type: text/html; charset=us-ascii
Patch is behaving funky once again, at the time of applying it. Appending patch output and attaching patch-setup.py.rej file.
